deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. CMA shows est. value $266K. Close date May 1, 2026. Template building for property analysis tool.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc, build analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used for property analysis tool basis.

deals.title: Borregas Property
deals.notes: Land/acreage, development potential. Referred to Isaac Linares for mobile home project. Sisters wanted to terminate after March. Isaac offered ~$150K contingent on project. Title defect: incomplete legal description on Partition Deed. Listing canceled, signs picked up.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Signs picked up last week. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development.
Title defect confirmed. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Jennifer Ball coordinating with ENV Title.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 2,972 sqft, pool, outdoor kitchen, 1994 build. Underwater ~$93K-$143K. Payoff $489,501. Carrying cost $5,300-$6,000/mo. Sellers moving back in to make updates before relisting.
deals.next: Terminated by mutual agreement, plan to relist after repairs

logs.m: Listing terminated. Matt and Chandler moving back into property. Plan to make updates and repairs, then relist.
Called Matt and Chandler, presented three paths. Chandler was laid off - strong hardship for short sale. Leaning toward short sale. Relationship intact.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June. Listed $259,900. Second-look buyers interested - their favorite property. Insurance claim for roof moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm showing time May 30, follow up with second-look buyers

logs.m: Second-look buyers back for showing - their favorite home. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled to May 30.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Canvassed neighborhood, distributed flyers. Sign and lockbox dropped.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, brick single story. Payoff ~$257K. CMA range $275K-$315K. Thin market (3 comps in 10 miles). Divorce situation, need to finish renovation and sell.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter, schedule photos, get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled. Built listing presentation with net sheet.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction, $152,000 contract. Military buyer. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Post-close follow-up items: gift delivery to Joyce, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank notary

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien release signed Apr 21 by Fernando Castillo.
Contacted lien holder Fabian Cerrillo. Willing to work with us on resolution.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned property, foreclosure. Damage occurred after bank possession. HouzzPro/Matt Toney contractor, work started May 9. Drywall crew patching. Police reports pending. Utilities: Medina Electric and EMCSUD need meter/service setup.
deals.next: Call utility companies, get meter #, replace camera batteries, submit listing agreement to bank

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Need to call utilities re: meter install status.
Work officially started. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters. Floor demo beginning.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property (19.71 in A-735, 0.29 in A-756). Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. Earnest money not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from Javier

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family, agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. Chicago Title escrow opened. EMD not received yet.
Property clearing complete. Steve sent photos. Drone footage flagged as next priority.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment. Pre-approval ~$122K. Recently out of Corpus Christi deal. Connected with Isaac Linares on 301 W Saxet wholesale deal ($85K, FHA 203k). Zach Schaphorst evaluating financing.
leads.next: Follow up with Zach on 203k feasibility, confirm deal status with Isaac

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - too much for them. Still actively searching. Isaac updated.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement income, daughters disability checks (co-borrowers possible). Paying $1,700/mo rent. Between jobs but motivated. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan zero down eligible. Last contact Apr 29 (sick grandkid). Overdue for follow-up since Apr 30.
leads.next: Call today to follow up, connect with VA lender, qualify timeline and budget

logs.m: Flagged overdue. Hot lead - VA buyer, $1,700 rent, motivated. Do not let slip again.
Spoke today - sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation, relationship intact.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief-to-healing-through-plants story. Potential content collaboration opportunity (with permission). Real estate potential through trust-based long-term relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally, ask permission to share story on social media

logs.m: Connected through garden share group. Content angle: Healing Through Gardens story.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 renovation site May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military (VA eligible). Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when on site, qualify wife VA eligibility, connect with VA lender

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife active military, VA buyer opportunity.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner, downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property needing work - unique situation. Caught up May 11, details still pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full buyer and property details, understand financing and scope

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Buyer interested in fixer property. Details pending.

priorities.title: Mill Path Showing Follow-up
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers are hottest lead - their favorite property. Rescheduled showing from May 29 to May 30. Need to confirm time with agent and sellers.

followUps.text: Follow up with buyers agent after showing

priorities.title: Colton Brown Listing Launch
priorities.sub: 485 W FM 462 - Get to contract ASAP
priorities.notes: Thin market (3 comps), payoff ~$257K, recommend list $295K. CMA complete, net sheet built. Need updated payoff letter, photos scheduled, listing agreement signed.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender

priorities.title: Priority Bank 181 CR Utilities
priorities.sub: Get electric meter # and water service confirmed
priorities.notes: Drywall crew patching actively. Need to call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) for transformer #, call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) for water service. Camera batteries need replacing. Listing agreement still pending to Jerry/Ray.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric for meter install status
Call EMCSUD for water service confirmation

priorities.title: Pamela Moore VA Buyer Follow-up
priorities.notes: Hot lead since Apr 8. Last contact Apr 29 (sick grandkid). Overdue since Apr 30. Military retirement + disability income. $1,700/mo rent. VA zero down eligible.

priorities.title: Tilden 20ac - EMD & Amendment
priorities.sub: Confirm Espinoza earnest money and signed TXR 1903
priorities.notes: Under contract at $113,000. Chicago Title open with Alyssa Castillo. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier for third party financing update. EMD not yet received.

followUps.text: Confirm EMD received from Espinoza buyer
Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
